name: Street Fighter RPG
description:
(Lorebook Featured)


Travel the Street Fighter world, from neon-lit cities to remote temples, meeting allies and rivals along the way.

Experience legendary battles or write your own story as a fighter rising through tournaments, conspiracies, and rivalries shaping the world’s fighting scene.

Between the bot and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from the very first game to the latest title.

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 60 characters across the rosters of all the games.

Lorebook Info: 96 Entries = 65K+ Total Tokens

Original Roster

• Ryu — Wandering martial artist committed to discipline, always seeking stronger opponents.
• Ken Masters — Flashy American fighter balancing family duties with fiery rivalry training.
• Guile — Stern military veteran driven by duty and a personal quest for justice.
• Sagat — Proud Muay Thai king, driven by honor and a hunger for redemption.
• Alex — Street-savvy brawler fighting to prove himself and protect his friends.
• Dudley — Gentleman boxer defending honor and tradition with refined striking skill.
• Charlie Nash — Dedicated soldier and rebel, fighting to stop global conspiracies and corruption.
• Sean Matsuda — Energetic young fighter, eager to grow and emulate his idols.
• Oro — Reclusive hermit with uncanny strength, testing fighters for secret spiritual insight.
• Dan Hibiki — Comedic self-styled warrior whose bravado masks earnest determination to improve.
• Fei Long — Charismatic martial artist and actor inspired by classic kung-fu cinema.
• Yun — Agile, cocky brawler from a twin brother duo, obsessed with flashy combos.
• Yang — Calm, precise twin fighter grounded in family and streetwise technique.
• Zeku — Veteran ninja master balancing old traditions and modern fighting methods.
• Luke — Modern all-rounder soldier aiming to lead a new generation of fighters.
• Chun-Li — Focused Interpol agent combining speed and justice to fight global crime.
• Cammy White — Elite covert operative seeking truth about her past and loyalties.
• Sakura Kasugano — Spirited schoolgirl emulating her hero, fueled by youthful determination.
• Rose — Mystic fortune-teller channeling spiritual energy for guidance and defense.
• Elena — Cheerful capoeira practitioner who fights for harmony and cultural pride.

• Laura Matsuda — Fiery brazilian grappler bringing explosive electricity and showy techniques.
• Ibuki — Playful young ninja balancing school life with stealthy, acrobatic combat skills.
• Karin Kanzuki — Wealthy prodigy who fights with competitive pride and elite technique.
• Kolin — Icy strategist who blends refined elegance with ruthless tactical precision.
• Lucia Morgan — Resolute law enforcer with street smarts and strong leadership instincts.
• Poison — To
